clue.name: VictimPosition
clue.title: Position of victim
clue.text:
You’ve acquired a CLUE: Position of victim
The bloodstain analysis revealed that the victim must have been standing when the bullet hit her head.
Did she shoot herself standing? What were the circumstances of her death?

clue.name: EmailPOI
clue.title: Email sender is a person of interest (POI)
clue.text:
You’ve acquired a CLUE: Email sender is a person of interest (POI)
The anonymous sender of these threatening emails claimed that Dr. Phillips turned his or her daughter into an addict by prescribing drugs she didn’t need.
Who wrote these emails? How far would this person go to avenge his or her daughter’s death?

clue.name: DrugAddiction
clue.title: Prescriptions rising
clue.text:
You’ve acquired a CLUE: Prescriptions rising
According to a document the victim was writing, titled “RESPONSE TO SUBPOENA”, the number of opioid analgesics and muscle relaxants the pain management center prescribed increased over the years.
Why was Dr. Phillips concerned about these numbers? What subpoena is she referring to?

clue.name: TOD
clue.title: Time of death
clue.text:
You’ve acquired a CLUE: Time of death
Based on the body temperature and the status of rigor mortis, Doc Robbins estimated that the victim died between 6 pm and 11 pm.
Was she alone? Make sure to check the clinic’s access log when it arrives to find out if anybody else was at the office around that time.

clue.name: LongDistShot
clue.title: Longer distance shot
clue.text:
You’ve acquired a CLUE: Longer distance shot
The presence of powder tattooing and the absence of any markings that are characteristic of a contact wound means that the deadly shot must have been fired from an intermediate range.
Should we consider that somebody else shot her?

clue.name: Bruises
clue.title: Victim was in a struggle
clue.text:
You’ve acquired a CLUE: Victim was in a struggle
The contusion around the victim’s arm suggests that somebody grabbed her arm forcefully shortly before she died.
Who could have caused the bruising?

clue.name: NoMatch
clue.title: Crime scene gun no match to deadly bullet
clue.text:
You’ve acquired a CLUE: Crime scene gun no match to deadly bullet
The fact that the gun the victim was holding in her hand did not fire the deadly shot means that somebody must have staged the scene to make it look like she killed herself.
Who did this? Where is the real murder weapon?

clue.name: VictimFingerprints
clue.title: Victim’s print on gun
clue.text:
You’ve acquired a CLUE: Victim’s print on gun
The fingerprint on the gun the victim was holding in her hand when she was found is from her.
Did she use this gun to shoot herself? How else could the gun have ended up in her hand?

clue.name: VictimBloodStains
clue.title: Bloodstains from victim
clue.text:
You’ve acquired a CLUE: Bloodstains from victim
The DNA profile generated from the DNA in the bloodstain samples matches the victim’s DNA profile.
There is nobody else’s blood at the crime scene – but does that mean nobody else was there?

clue.name: ForeignSkin
clue.title: Foreign tissue under victim's fingernails
clue.text:
You’ve acquired a CLUE: Foreign tissue under victim's fingernails
The DNA profile generated from tissue underneath the victim’s fingernails matches neither the victim nor anybody in CODIS.
Whose tissue is it? Collect DNA samples from persons of interest to search for a match.

clue.name: Subpoena
clue.title: Subpoena
clue.text:
You’ve acquired a CLUE: Subpoena
Dr. Phillips was ordered to testify before court and bring documents connected to violation of the controlled substance act by employees of the pain management center.
What kind of violations were happening here, and who was involved? How is this connected to our case?

clue.name: PrescriptionCash
clue.title: Switch to cash
clue.text:
You’ve acquired a CLUE: Switch to cash
Melissa McCoy, the late daughter of the email sender who threatened our victim, was prescribed increasing amounts of pain relievers and muscle relaxants. She also started paying cash for her doctor visits.
If Melissa needed all these drugs, why didn’t her insurance pay for it?

clue.name: Prescriptions
clue.title: Daughter's prescriptions
clue.text:
You’ve acquired a CLUE: Daughter’s prescriptions
The prescription drugs Melissa’s father found in her apartment include pain killers, muscle relaxants, and Xanax, an anti-anxiety medication. They are all from Edgar’s pharmacy.
Pharmacists are required to warn patients about the risks of taking too many drugs together. You should visit Edgar’s pharmacy and ask about this.

clue.name: AssistantPOI
clue.title: Assistant is a person of interest (POI)
clue.text:
You’ve acquired a CLUE: Assistant is a person of interest (POI)
The access log revealed that Anna Steward was at the crime scene around the time Dr. Phillips died.
Could she have witnessed who shot our victim? Or was she the one who pulled the trigger?

clue.name: ToxResults
clue.title: Drug-related death
clue.text:
You’ve acquired a CLUE: Drug-related death
Melissa’s autopsy results suggest that multiple drug interactions contributed to her fatal accident.
Most of these drugs are controlled substances. How did she get all the prescriptions?

clue.name: PharmacistBank
clue.title: Pharmacist received large sum
clue.text:
You’ve acquired a CLUE: Pharmacist received large sum
Edgar White, the pharmacist who handed Melissa McCoy the prescription drugs that caused drug interactions, received $5,000 from the pain clinic.
It is very unusual for a clinic to pay a pharmacist. What was this money for?

clue.name: PharmacistSkin
clue.title: Pharmacist’s tissue on victim
clue.text:
You’ve acquired a CLUE: Pharmacist’s tissue on victim
This finding means that Edgar White was the one the victim was in physical contact with shortly before she died.
Were they in a struggle? What were they fighting over?

clue.name: PharmacistWeaponMatches
clue.title: Pharmacist’s gun matches autopsy bullet
clue.text:
You’ve acquired a CLUE: Pharmacist’s gun matches autopsy bullet
The bullet comparison revealed that the deadly shot was fired from Edgar White’s gun.
Was he also the shooter?
